hero.subtitle: Building digital products with Node.js, React and React Native for 6+ years.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a fullstack developer with over 6 years of experience building robust and scalable digital products. Currently working at Waac - Soluções Tecnológicas, in São José dos Campos, Brazil.
about.bio2: I have expertise in TypeScript/JavaScript across all application layers: REST APIs with Node.js and NestJS, modern frontends with React and Next.js, and mobile apps with React Native. I also work with messaging (Kafka) and cloud (AWS).

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Available for freelance projects and opportunities.
contact.location: São José dos Campos - SP, Brazil
